LanguageData.VFED_Aerodrone.description: Vertibot is a spacer-tech, unmanned aerial vehicle equipped with advanced sensors and a missile payload. Designed for autonomous long-range operations, it's commonly used by the Whitespring Enclave for reconnaissance and bombardment. Its ability to release powerful missile salvos makes it effective against various targets. This vertibot is temporarily disabled due to the recharge cycle.
LanguageData.VFED_Aerodrone.label: vertibot
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneBatteryPack.description: A large, overcharged vertibot battery. Will release a strong electromagnetic pulse when damaged, potentially disabling nearby defenses.
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneBatteryPack.label: vertibot battery pack
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.description: A large military crate of vertibot munitions. Will explode when damaged, sending armed shells flying in random directions.
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.label: vertibot munitions crate
LanguageData.VFED_Apparel_InvisibilityEngulfer.descri: A multi-use personal stealthboy cloak device engineered based on experimental Whitespring technology. Allows the user to become completely invisible for a brief duration, after which the device requires a short amount of time to recharge.
LanguageData.VFED_Apparel_InvisibilityEngulfer.label: stealthboy
LanguageData.VFED_BiosecuredCrate.description: A small Whitespring crate containing extremely valuable items. May contain critical intel. Due to the special restrictions, only senior Whitespring officials are capable of opening it.\n\nAny attempt to destroy it will destroy the items as well.
LanguageData.VFED_BurnoutIntelScraper.description: A Brotherhood expeditionary device capable of intercepting Whitespring communication. When activated, it will begin intel scraping, emitting a pulse at regular intervals. Each pulse has a chance of generating a small amount of intel, but it may also increase your visibility and even alert a Whitespring strike force. After 10 pulses, the machine burns out and triggers a fiery explosion.
LanguageData.VFED_CrashedAerodrone.label: crashed vertibot
LanguageData.VFED_CriticalIntel.description: A dossier containing critical information about the Shattered Whitespring Enclave. In order to protect the information from the Whitespring counterintelligence, the information needs to be stored in a physical form. It can be used to plan high-profile assassination attempts, but it can also be exchanged for standard intel via the contraband system.
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterDeclassifier.description: A Brotherhood expeditionary declassifier is a single-use, ultra-tech device consisting of a brain-scan apparatus and a long, thick needle. It is primarily used by Whitespring Brotherhood expeditionaries for data extraction. By inserting the needle into the skull of a senior official, memories can be downloaded from their brain, forming valuable Brotherhood expeditionary intel. The amount of intel received is determined by the rank of the target official. The person affected by a Brotherhood Expeditionary Declassifier dies in the process, and when used on neutral visitors, it is treated as an act of war.
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterDeclassifier.label: Brotherhood declassifier
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttle.description: A spacer-tech vertibird designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system.
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttle.label: Brotherhood vertibird
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttleIncoming.label: Brotherhood vertibird (incoming)
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttleLeaving.label: Brotherhood vertibird (leaving)
LanguageData.VFED_Filth_Propaganda.label: Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_FlagshipChunk.description: A chunk of a Whitespring flagship. It seems to have been torn off by some kind of powerful weapon.\n\nHaving landed not long ago, it still contains useful resources which you can acquire by deconstructing it.
LanguageData.VFED_FlagshipChunk.label: kovac-muldoon debris
LanguageData.VFED_FuelTank.description: A large fuel tank used to refuel Whitespring vertibirds. Will detonate if damaged beyond a certain point, potentially triggering a chain reaction.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialMaxpack.description: The governmental APC is a formidable armored transport truck, known for its impressive cargo capacity. Its armor is impenetrable, ensuring the safety of its contents throughout transit. Once in motion, the APCâ€™s doors remain sealed until it reaches its predetermined destination. While attempting to loot its cargo is futile due to built-in self-destruct protocols, its robust exterior makes it an ideal shield on the battlefield.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialMaxpack.label: governmental APC
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialMegaHighShield.description: An advanced shielding apparatus, the Whitespring mega high-shield projects a vast momentum repulsor field, allowing shots to exit but preventing any from entering. Specifically calibrated for high angles, it's adept at deflecting incoming mortar rounds, vertibot strikes, and even orbital slicer beams. The unit can be temporarily disabled by EMP attacks, either by shocking the projector unit itself, or using EMP munitions on the shield. Draws huge amounts of power.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialMegaHighShield.label: governmental mega high-shield
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialUnderfarm.description: An underground hydroponics bay used by the Whitespring Enclave to feed its personnel. Fully automated and connected to water mains, these farms require no labor to operate.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialUnderfarm.label: Whitespring underfarm
LanguageData.VFED_Intel.description: A dossier containing information about the Shattered Whitespring Enclave. In order to protect the information from the Whitespring counterintelligence, the information needs to be stored in a physical form. It can be used to obtain pre-War tech from the Brotherhood expeditionaries, or to gain access to quests and even assassination missions on Whitespring officials.
LanguageData.VFED_PsychicAmplifier.description: Decommissioned Whitespring technology since the invention of psylink neuroformers, the psychic amplifier upgrades a psylink in the user's mind. It cannot form a psylink by itself, and can only be used by colonists with already present psylink. The user presses the device over the eyes, where it links to the brain directly and restructures part of it. Afterwards, the device disintegrates into worthless ash.
LanguageData.VFED_PsychicAmplifier.label: cryptid amplifier
LanguageData.VFED_StrikeBuoy.description: A small surveillance buoy usually deployed around temporary convoy stops. Linked directly with a patrolling vertibot, once triggered, it will send down a small missile salvo on its location.
LanguageData.VFED_SupplyCrate.description: A small Whitespring crate containing valuables. May contain intel. Opening it requires bypassing several security protocols and takes a short while.\n\nAny attempt to destroy it will destroy the items as well.
LanguageData.VFED_SurveillanceDisplayBank.description: A Whitespring computer interface. Linked to the surveillance console, the display bank shows live footage from all surveillance pillars in the sector.
LanguageData.VFED_SurveillancePillar.description: A large pillar with a series of sensors, cameras, and motion detectors. Thanks to the sophisticated face recognition system, the surveillance pillar can detect the presence of Brotherhood expeditionaries in radius and will increase the visibility of whichever faction has sent them. Can be disabled via electromagnetic pulse, or by simply cutting off the power grid.
LanguageData.VFED_TechiteDiscStack.description: A compact stack of data discs produced exclusively by the Whitespring Enclave for knowledge transcription. They are primarily designed for preserving information. When ignited, they release a dense cloud of blinding smoke and sparks, capable of engulfing a wide area in flames.
LanguageData.VFED_TechiteDiscStack.label: data disc stack
LanguageData.VFED_Techprinter.description: The Data Printer is a marvel of technological innovation, designed to capture and preserve the intricate knowledge residing within a scientistâ€™s mind. These advanced machines imprint this invaluable information directly onto data discs. Techprints provide foundational knowledge for researchers, shedding light on innovations from more advanced societies.
LanguageData.VFED_Techprinter.label: data printer
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonCapacitorBank.label: orbital cannon capacitor bank
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonControlStation.descriptio: This terminal serves as the primary interface for operating the Orbital Cannon batteries. Equipped with sophisticated controls and targeting systems, the Orbital Cannon Control Station ensures precision and coordination when deploying the formidable firepower of the Orbital Cannons. Operators need to be within its radius to control it.
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonControlStation.label: orbital cannon control station
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_HighExplosive.label: remote charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_HighExplosive.descrip: A pair of high-explosive shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Incendiary.label: remote incendiary charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Incendiary.descriptio: A pair of incendiary shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_EMP.label: remote EMP charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_EMP.description: A pair of EMP shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Smoke.label: remote smoke charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Smoke.description: A pair of smoke shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Firefoam.label: remote firefoam charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Firefoam.description: A pair of firefoam shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_AntigrainWarhead.desc: A pair of antigrain warheads connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_BombPack_Deployed.label: deployed bomb pack
LanguageData.VFED_BombPack_Deployed.description: A deployed bomb pack. Itâ€™s armed, and can be detonated with a press of a button.
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_Shrapnel.label: IED shrapnel trap
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_Shrapnel.description: A pair of shrapnel shells connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_ArmorPiercing.label: IED armor-piercing trap
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_ArmorPiercing.description: A pair of armor-piercing shells connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_Cluster.label: IED cluster trap
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_Cluster.description: A pair of cluster shells connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Shrapnel.label: remote shrapnel charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Shrapnel.description: A pair of shrapnel shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_ArmorPiercing.label: remote armor-piercing charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_ArmorPiercing.descrip: A pair of armor-piercing shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Cluster.label: remote cluster charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Cluster.description: A pair of cluster shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_Turret_Kontarion.label: kontarion
LanguageData.VFED_Turret_Kontarion.description: A powerful, long-range weapon used by the Whitespring Enclave to take out enemy targets from afar. Kontarion turret fires ultra-dense uranium slugs at incredible speeds, penetrating even the heaviest armor. With its rapid-fire capabilities, tremendous accuracy and infinite range, it's a force to be reckoned with. It's more accurate at longer ranges, and can't fire at all close up. May explode when damaged.\n\nIt consumes a lot of ammunition, and requires an adjacent crate of uranium slug ammo in order to automatically reload. It cannot be reloaded by hand.
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_Kontarion.label: kontarion cannon
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_Kontarion.description: A self-loading uranium slug cannon designed to attach to a turret.
LanguageData.VFED_Turret_Palintone.label: palintone
LanguageData.VFED_Turret_Palintone.description: A powerful, anti-infantry weapon used by the Whitespring Enclave to defend unsafe outposts. Palintone turret fires large-caliber shells at incredible speeds, dealing heavy damage over significant ranges. It fires huge volleys of rounds that can provide suppressive fire and quickly shred lightly armored targets. With its devastating firepower, the Palintone turret is capable of keeping even the largest enemy forces at bay. May explode when damaged.\n\nIt consumes a lot of ammunition, and requires an adjacent crate of autocannon ammo in order to automatically reload. It cannot be reloaded by hand.
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_Palintone.label: palintone cannon
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_Palintone.description: A self-loading cannon designed to attach to a turret.
LanguageData.VFED_Turret_Onager.label: onager
LanguageData.VFED_Turret_Onager.description: A powerful, anti-armored weapon used by the Whitespring Enclave to destroy heavily armored targets with ease. Capable of launching missiles in bursts of 6, the Onager can deal devastating damage to enemy forces in a short amount of time. The Onager turret is most effective at short range, where its missiles can be accurately targeted at enemy positions. However, it cannot fire at enemies that are too close, as the missiles require a certain distance to arm and track their targets. Additionally, due to the sheer number of missiles it fires, the Onager is not as accurate as other turrets, and can sometimes miss its targets. May explode when damaged.\n\nIt consumes a lot of ammunition, and requires an adjacent crate of missile ammo in order to automatically reload. It cannot be reloaded by hand.
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_Onager.label: onager cannon
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_Onager.description: A self-loading rocket launcher designed to attach to a turret.
LanguageData.VFFED_Bullet_Onager.label: onager
LanguageData.VFED_Turret_StrikerTurret.label: striker turret
LanguageData.VFED_Turret_StrikerTurret.description: A stationary, powerful turret. Will self-destruct if it is sufficiently damaged.
LanguageData.VFED_AmmoBox_UraniumSlug.label: uranium slug ammo box
LanguageData.VFED_AmmoBox_UraniumSlug.description: A small-sized box containing uranium slug ammunition. Used by Kontarion turrets to reload. May explode when damaged.
LanguageData.VFED_AmmoBox_Autocannon.label: autocannon ammo box
LanguageData.VFED_AmmoBox_Autocannon.description: A small-sized box containing autocannon ammunition. Used by Palintone turrets to reload. May explode when damaged.
LanguageData.VFED_AmmoBox_Missile.label: missile ammo box
LanguageData.VFED_AmmoBox_Missile.description: A small-sized box containing missiles. Used by Onager turrets to reload. May explode when damaged.
LanguageData.VFED_SupplyCrate.label: supply crate
LanguageData.VFED_BiosecuredCrate.label: biosecured crate
LanguageData.VFED_SurveillancePillar.label: surveillance pillar
LanguageData.VFED_StrikeBuoy.label: strike buoy
LanguageData.VFED_FuelTank.label: fuel tank
LanguageData.VFED_SurveillanceStation.label: surveillance console
LanguageData.VFED_SurveillanceStation.description: A large console designed to link to surrounding surveillance pillars. Provides users with all the necessary data related to enemy movements in a given sector.
LanguageData.VFED_SurveillanceDisplayBank.label: surveillance display bank
LanguageData.VFED_WaterMain.label: water main
LanguageData.VFED_WaterMain.description: A large node connecting all the nearby water mains. Required for the underfarms to operate.
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonCapacitorBank.description: A capacitor bank that transforms electricity into raw energy for the Zeus cannon. Will release a large EMP shockwave when destroyed, potentially disabling the Zeus cannon itself.
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannon.label: orbital cannon
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannon.description: A relic of ancient Sophiamundan technology, the Orbital Cannon is a closely guarded secret of the Whitespring Enclave. This formidable artillery piece has the unique ability to convert vast quantities of electricity into potent energy blasts. With unmatched range, it can pierce the atmosphere to target and obliterate objects in orbit. A testament to lost engineering brilliance, it stands as both a weapon and a symbol of the Whitespring Enclave's might.\n\nIt has a long charging cycle, after which it will aim at the target and release a devastating energy blast.
LanguageData.VFED_BurnoutIntelScraper.label: burnout intel scraper
LanguageData.VFED_Biodecoder.label: biodecoder
LanguageData.VFED_Biodecoder.description: A biodecoder is a single-use ultratech device that is designed to strip biocoding off any item. It uses a complex process to unlatch the biocoding from the original item, which transfers the biocoding onto the biodecoder, breaking it in the process. Biodecoder can also be used on biosecured crate to open them. This device is often used in sensitive operations where the presence of biocoding could compromise the mission.
LanguageData.VFED_Intel.label: intel
LanguageData.VFED_CriticalIntel.label: critical intel
LanguageData.VFED_Shell_Shrapnel.label: shrapnel shell
LanguageData.VFED_Shell_Shrapnel.description: Mortar shell that is designed to explode mid-air and release a large number of sharp projectiles. These projectiles are specifically designed to cut through light armored enemies, inflicting serious injuries or fatalities. Projectiles are ejected with the same vector as the mortar shell, and may be stopped by obstacles.
LanguageData.VFED_Bullet_Shell_Shrapnel.label: shrapnel shell
LanguageData.VFED_Bullet_Shrapnel.label: shrapnel
LanguageData.VFED_Shell_ArmorPiercing.label: armor-piercing shell
LanguageData.VFED_Shell_ArmorPiercing.description: Armor-piercing shells are designed to explode upon impact and destroy anything they hit, completely bypassing the armor of the target. Their explosion radius is almost non-existent, and armored targets need to be hit directly for the shell to destroy them. They are very accurate and travel at extreme speeds.
LanguageData.VFED_Bullet_Shell_ArmorPiercing.label: armor-piercing shell
LanguageData.VFED_Shell_Cluster.label: cluster shell
LanguageData.VFED_Shell_Cluster.description: Mortar shell that is designed to split mid-air and release three high-explosive shells. Separated shells are ejected in random directions, following the same vector as the cluster shell. Explosions cover a high area but the accuracy of the shells leave a lot to be desired.
LanguageData.VFED_Bullet_Shell_Cluster.label: cluster shell
LanguageData.VFED_Apparel_BombPack.label: bomb pack
LanguageData.VFED_Apparel_BombPack.description: A single-use man-portable explosive device. Deployed on the ground, it becomes armed and can be detonated with a press of a button. It generates a big explosion thanks to a wired-in antigrain warhead, making it capable of destroying critical infrastructure and personnel alike.
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneStrikeIncoming.label: vertibot strike
LanguageData.VFED_Spark.label: spark
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_ChargeCycler.label: pulse cycler
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_ChargeCycler.description: A modified charged-shot revolver that incorporates mechanoid technology. Recovered thump cannons have been reversed engineered to allow for a powerful charge revolver with two shooting modes to be created. Charged shot mode will eliminate any close targets with a powerful, armor-piercing blast, whilst a Thump shot mode allows users to incapacitate enemies and break any defenses they might be hiding behind. Modes can be changed with a press of a button.
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_ChargeCycler.verbs.0.label: Single shot (Charged shot)
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_ChargeCycler.verbs.1.label: Single shot (Thump shot)
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_ChargeCycler.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_ChargeCycler.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.VFED_Bullet_ChargedShot.label: pulse shot
LanguageData.VFEE_Bullet_ThumpShot.label: concussion shot
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_Fletchling.label: acid scattergun
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_Fletchling.description: A modification to the extremely rare fletcher rifle, fletchling is a shotgun commonly used by Whitespring Brotherhood expeditionaries. The mere possession of it can be seen as an act of war against the Shattered Whitespring Enclave. Each fletchling shot releases a number of small acidifier darts that may hit several targets, causing extreme amounts of pain and acid burns. Lethal to organics and almost useless against non-organics, such as mechanoids. \n\nTargets hit by these flechettes will be inflicted with an unstable variant of acidifier fluids, designed to dissolve the target from the inside rather than destroy their equipment. The acid will rampage through the targetâ€™s body and usually results in vital organs being dissolved, however lethality isnâ€™t guaranteed.
LanguageData.VFED_Gun_Fletchling.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.VFEE_Bullet_FletchlingDart.label: fletcher dart
